no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested FEAT docs already contain the new tab structure and the re-queue audit-event schema in HEAD, but `ddx doc audit` is not repo-clean for unrelated preexisting reasons, so I cannot certify acceptance criterion 3 from this worktree.

Evidence:
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md:74-105 names the project tabs and the shared run-detail tabs for work/try/run.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-executions.md:650-684 documents the `run_requeue` audit-event schema.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-executions.md:709-723 maps the work/try/run chips to the shared tab strip.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-019-agent-evaluation.md:62-81 and docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md:138-147 carry the same tab-structure and re-queue references.

Audit result:
- `ddx doc audit` reports a long-standing graph cycle and many duplicate IDs outside this bead's scope, plus one missing dependency, so the repository is not globally clean in this worktree.
